mnemonics: EARTHLING - Environment, Agents, Rationality, Theories, Humans Learn
RARE - Rationality, Agents, Reasoning, Environment, Theories
keyPoints: Environment: Everything around an agent that can affect its actions
Concept of Rationality: A set of principles that guide an agent's decision-making
The nature of environment: Can be static or dynamic, and can be perceived by the agent
The structure of agents: Includes perception, reasoning, and action
